PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('profile')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('test')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
          PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''one'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''two'')
          PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
        PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
          PsiElement(()('(')
          PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('map')
            PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
              PsiElement(()('(')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
              PsiElement())(')')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
              PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
                PsiElement(|)('|')
                PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
                PsiElement(|)('|')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
                PsiElement({)('{')
                PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"value: ')
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
                PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
                PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
